message:
feat(workflows): Comprehensive workflow execution system with runner and scheduling

Major expansion of the workflow system to include event-driven execution,
policy-gated terminal injection, dry-run support, scheduling, and a
flexible workflow registry.

WorkflowContext enhancements:
- Add PolicyGatedInjector integration via with_injector()
- send_text(), send_ctrl_c(), send_ctrl_d(), send_ctrl_z() methods for
  policy-controlled terminal input from workflow steps
- BoxFuture type alias for dyn-compatible trait methods
- Update Workflow trait to use BoxFuture for execute_step/cleanup

WorkflowRunner - Event-driven execution:
- Subscribes to detection events, finds matching workflows
- Acquires per-pane locks before execution (prevents conflicts)
- Executes workflow steps with retry and wait condition support
- Releases locks on completion, abort, or error

WorkflowStartResult / WorkflowExecutionResult:
- Structured results for workflow initiation and completion
- Variants: Started, NoMatchingWorkflow, PaneLocked, Error
- Execution results: Completed, Aborted, PolicyDenied, Error

Dry-run support:
- DryRunAction enum: describes actions without executing
- dry_run() method on WorkflowContext returns planned actions
- WorkflowEngine.dry_run() for full dry-run execution simulation

WorkflowRegistry:
- Register workflows with metadata (description, version, etc.)
- Find workflows by name or matching detection
- List all registered workflows

Cron scheduling:
- WorkflowScheduler with cron-style schedules (via cron crate)
- ScheduledEntry tracks next_run and workflow/pane parameters
- tick() method returns workflows ready to run
- Supports multiple schedules per workflow

Tests cover context creation, injection delegation, dry-run mode,
registry operations, and scheduler tick behavior.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
